title: BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd!
